String: Aramid fiber has revolutionized armor to become durable versus high speed projectiles and heated beams. Utilizing a layer of high strength polymer blends, this armor is able to absorb the lion’s share of most impacts against it.

A stripped-down version of the Heavy Infensus Battle armor, the “Essentials” line foregoes a flush coolant system for greater speed and maneuverability, though it retains the armor’s heavy plating designed to turn, disperse and shed heat.
